title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-contained LLM runner that bundles model weights, config & data into a single Modelfile; macOS/Linux/Windows, REST+CLI, 70+ quantized models.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party async/sync Python client for the Ollama REST API; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama chat, generate & embed via standard LangChain interfaces.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; markdown, code highlight, model management, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async, fluent API, streaming, pull/generate/chat/embed.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; chat, generate, pull, list, delete.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI for chatting, model management & benchmarking; built with Python Prompt Toolkit.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat sidebar.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models as Generator or Embedder in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: PDF chat, voice bots, function calling, Next.js apps, fine-tune Modelfiles.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC, ingress & autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and compose files for running Ollama in Docker.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain; ingest PDFs, query via CLI or REST.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses in chat; supports slash commands, model switching, thread context.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bolt app bringing Ollama models into channels/DMs with streaming replies and model picker.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package for macOS/iOS apps; async/await wrappers around Ollama REST endpoints.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete, summarization & grammar fix using Ollama.

title: ollama-npm-search
summary: NPM registry search CLI powered by Ollama embeddings + vector search; find packages semantically.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example for scaling Ollama models across GPU workers with autoscaling.
